chefsSpecials.name: Goan Shrimp Curry
chefsSpecials.reason: Shrimp cooked Goan style with coconut milk and curry leaves — a coastal Indian favorite that our guests can't stop ordering.

chefsSpecials.name: Lamb Roganjosh
chefsSpecials.reason: Tender lamb simmered in a fragrant yogurt, cardamom and saffron curry sauce, authentic Kashmiri style.

chefsSpecials.name: Green Chili Chicken
chefsSpecials.reason: A fiery favorite — hot green chilis, fresh peppers and garam masala create the perfect spicy kick.
